item.title: Stipple Bio Launch
item.description:
• Summary: Stealth-mode biotech Stipple Bio has officially launched with $100 million in funding to develop next-generation antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) for cancer. The company's platform focuses on identifying more precise protein targets on cancer cells to improve the therapeutic index and efficacy of ADC therapies. Stipple aims to address limitations in current oncology treatments by enhancing tumor selectivity and reducing off-target toxicity.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: STAT News, Endpoints News
